title: Evangelion Iron Maiden 2nd
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Iron Maiden 2nd ?             Quote Post by B.H. » Thu Apr 28, 2005 2:47 pm I Figured this may be the best mesage board to ask this. I know this is a long shot but does anyone know where I can find an english walkthrough, or even more doubtful a written translation of the game Evangelion Iron Maiden 2nd not the first the second games. All I can find is info etc on the first thanks for the help. P.s If anyone wants any shots from the game I will glady post them.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 28, 2005 2:57 pm A systematic collection of GOS2's graphics would be sweet. Sort of like what I did for GOS1, here. http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=638

[]:             Quote Post by B.H. » Thu Apr 28, 2005 3:02 pm Just ahead of time they are not in any order, but some are split second shots, and some are alternate endings. Just give me a second, get a few together :oops: Edit: Ok here we go just a few Eva/Angels shots http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/finalebva.jpg http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/adam2nd.jpg http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/02evaaction.jpg http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/01eva.jpg http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/12.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Apr 28, 2005 3:08 pm Good I make a mana dart board now :P

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Apr 28, 2005 3:14 pm DatDude wrote: Good I make a mana dart board now :P

[]:             Quote Post by B.H. » Thu Apr 28, 2005 3:16 pm Just a few character shots, Some of these are just like the alternate reality segment in the final epsiodes of eva, and the kaworu one always makes me giggle, BTW all these are taken by myself but if anyone wants to use they on a website or whatever feel free. http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/kaji9986.jpg http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/hugme_--.jpg http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/kwarpop2nd.jpg http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/7u6yutjhhguy687657657.jpg http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y162/blackheart123456/4.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by B.H. » Thu Apr 28, 2005 3:17 pm Hunter21 wrote: DatDude wrote: Good I make a mana dart board now :P

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 28, 2005 3:28 pm BH, would it be possible to eventually compile a "definitive" collection like I did? I find that properly organizing game screenshots is impossible without access to the game itself... Just some wishful thinking. Also, a lower compression factor would be groovy. (Red colors are especially vulnerable to JPEG-ization.) Funny, the EVA-01 cage shot is gratuitously recycled from GOS. And seeing a harpy in a cage is just... wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by B.H. » Thu Apr 28, 2005 3:32 pm I would genuinely would love to but with everything else in my life sitting down and sorting out so many screenshots would be a dream, sorry Reichu, but if you want I can try to get any perticular you might like. I assume the Asuka fans may like the half naked ones :shock:

I assume the Asuka fans may like the half naked ones :shock:

BTW, I am also incapable.

[]:             Quote Post by no common sense » Thu Apr 28, 2005 7:15 pm Half nekkid Asuka :shock: You mean more chances to titalize a 14 year old girl? I don't know if I should be appalled or begging to see them. Aw fuck, I'm a guy so we already know the answer to that.
